title: View live trading dashboard status, stats, and sessions list
description: Verifies the home dashboard renders agent status, stats bar, and a list of trading sessions for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the home dashboard content to load
Verify the agent status is displayed with an online/offline indicator and a time since last session
Verify the stats bar is displayed with session and performance summary metrics
Verify a list of session cards is displayed in the feed

title: View live sessions feed with agent status, stats, and portfolio summary
description: Verifies a guest can open the home dashboard and see agent status, a stats summary, a live trade feed, and a portfolio summary rendered together.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the agent status and time since last session are displayed
Verify the stats summary bar is displayed
Verify a list of recent sessions is displayed
Verify the portfolio summary section is displayed

title: View portfolio summary and trade history on the dashboard
description: Verifies the portfolio summary card renders overall value/P&L information and trade history entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the portfolio summary section to load
Verify the portfolio summary displays total value and P&L information
Verify recent trade history entries are displayed

title: Trade feed auto-refresh updates sessions without breaking page state
description: Verifies the home trade feed automatically refreshes and updates session content after the polling interval without disrupting browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the sessions feed to finish initial loading
Scroll down within the sessions feed
Wait for 12 seconds
Verify the sessions feed is still displayed and populated
Verify the user remains on the home dashboard with the feed still usable

title: Navigate from a trade proof link to the related session detail
description: Verifies clicking a trade history proof link opens the corresponding session detail for investigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the portfolio trade history to load
Click a trade's proof link
Verify the session detail view is displayed with the audit timeline

title: Auto-refresh feed updates sessions without losing browsing context
description: Verifies the trade feed auto-refreshes on a timer and continues to function while the user is browsing the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the session feed to load
Scroll down within the sessions feed to a mid-page position
Wait for at least 12 seconds
Verify session cards are still displayed and the feed remains usable at the current scroll position

title: Open a session from the home feed and view audit timeline
description: Verifies a guest can open a session from the home feed and see the 5-step audit timeline on the session detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a session card to open its detail view
Verify the session detail view is displayed
Verify the 5-step audit timeline is displayed

title: Run on-chain verification and show per-step verification badges
description: Verifies running verification computes and compares hashes and displays per-step match/mismatch badges.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the session feed to load
Click a session card to open its details
Run session verification
Verify verification results are displayed with per-step match/mismatch badges

title: Open a session detail from a session card
description: Verifies selecting a session from the feed navigates to the session detail page and renders the audit timeline.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the session feed to load
Click a session card to open its details
Verify the session detail view shows the 5-step audit timeline

title: View portfolio analytics overview
description: User can open the analytics dashboard and see key performance stat cards plus multiple charts rendered for investigating agent performance.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Wait for the analytics content to finish loading
Verify summary stat cards for portfolio performance are displayed
Verify at least one analytics chart is displayed

title: Inspect audit timeline by expanding a step to view reasoning and raw JSON
description: Verifies a user can expand an audit step and inspect both human-readable reasoning and the raw JSON payload.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the session feed to load
Click a session card to open its details
Expand one audit step in the timeline
Verify the expanded step displays reasoning content and raw JSON details

title: Inspect audit steps by expanding each step to view reasoning and raw JSON
description: Verifies a guest can expand audit timeline steps on a session detail page to view step reasoning and raw JSON payloads.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a session card to open its detail view
Expand the POLICY step
Expand the MARKET step
Expand the DECISION step
Expand the CHECK step
Expand the EXECUTION step
Verify expanded steps show human-readable reasoning content
Verify expanded steps show a raw JSON payload section

title: Return from session detail back to the feed
description: Verifies the user can navigate back from session detail to the home feed and continue browsing sessions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the session feed to load
Click a session card to open its details
Use the in-app navigation to return to the feed
Verify the home feed is displayed with session cards available for browsing

title: Return from session detail back to home feed and continue browsing
description: Verifies a guest can navigate back from a session detail view to the home feed and continue viewing sessions and portfolio info.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a session card to open its detail view
Use the in-app navigation to return to the sessions feed
Verify the sessions feed is displayed
Verify the portfolio summary section is displayed

title: Browse archived sessions and open a legacy session
description: Verifies the user can reveal archived sessions and open a session from the feed into its detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the session feed to load
Toggle the archive control to reveal legacy sessions
Scroll to a session card in the feed
Click the session card to open its details
Verify the session detail view is displayed

title: Inspect cumulative P&L chart
description: User can view a cumulative P&L chart on the analytics dashboard to understand performance over time.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Scroll to the P&L chart section
Verify a cumulative P&L chart is displayed
Verify the chart contains plotted data points or segments

title: Attempt to attest without a connected wallet shows connect prompt
description: Verifies a guest attempting to attest a session is prompted to connect a wallet before attesting.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a session card to open its detail view
Click the attest control
Verify a prompt to connect a wallet is displayed
Verify the session is not shown as newly attested by the current user

title: Inspect portfolio value chart
description: User can view a portfolio value chart on the analytics dashboard to understand portfolio value trends over time.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Scroll to the portfolio value chart section
Verify a portfolio value chart is displayed
Verify the chart contains plotted data points or segments

title: Copy a step hash from the audit timeline
description: Verifies a user can copy an audit step hash and receives a visible confirmation that the copy action occurred.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the session feed to load
Click a session card to open its details
Expand one audit step in the timeline
Click the control to copy the step hash
Verify a copy-to-clipboard confirmation is visible

title: Open Strategy page as guest shows connect prompt and blocks editing
description: Verifies a guest can visit the strategy configuration page and is prompted to connect a wallet before editing policy settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /strategy
Verify a wallet connection prompt is displayed
Verify strategy editing controls are not available until a wallet is connected

title: View verdict distribution breakdown
description: User can view the verdict distribution visualization to understand how often each decision outcome occurs.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Scroll to the verdict distribution section
Verify a verdict distribution chart is displayed
Verify the distribution includes multiple categories or slices

title: View attestations section on session detail
description: Verifies a guest can view the attestations section on a session detail page and see either a populated list or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a session card to open its detail view
Scroll to the attestations section
Verify an attestation count is displayed
Verify either an attester list is displayed or an empty state is shown

title: View confidence histogram
description: User can view the confidence histogram to understand how agent confidence values are distributed across decisions.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Scroll to the confidence section
Verify a confidence histogram chart is displayed
Verify the histogram contains multiple bins or bars

title: Analytics page remains usable after scrolling through all sections
description: User can scroll through all analytics sections and the page remains interactive with charts still visible in their sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Scroll to the bottom of the analytics page
Scroll back to the top of the analytics page
Verify summary stat cards are still displayed
Verify at least one analytics chart is still displayed

title: Display orphan trades with no proof label when present
description: Verifies trades without an associated proof are clearly marked as having no proof when such trades appear in history.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the portfolio trade history to load
Scroll through the trade history entries
Verify any trade without a proof link is shown with an indicator that no proof is available

title: Cancel wallet connect modal and remain in guest state
description: Verifies a guest can open the wallet connect modal and cancel it, remaining unconnected with guest UI state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the connect wallet call-to-action
Close the wallet selection modal
Verify the header still shows a connect wallet call-to-action
Verify no connected wallet address is displayed
